name: Basil Oil
recipeIngredient: 1/2 ounce fresh basil (leaves and stems), roughly chopped (about 1/3 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the basil and olive oil in the bowl of a food processor or blender.
2. Puree for 10 seconds.
3. Transfer the mixture to a half-pint Mason jar, cover tightly, and set aside for about 1 hour, until the basil settles to the bottom.
4. Strain the contents through a fine sieve into a one-cup glass measuring cup.
5. The oil is ready to use immediately. It must be stored in the refrigerator, where it has a shelf life of up to 1 week.
